scripts.build: pnpm --filter client build && pnpm --filter server build
scripts.docs:build: pnpm --filter claude-code-web-docs generate && pnpm --filter claude-code-web-docs build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter client test:run && pnpm --filter server test:run
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm --filter client test:coverage && pnpm --filter server test:coverage
